profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Andalan Sakti Primaindo Tbk engages in the real estate business in Indonesia. The company develops and sells houses, shop houses, apartments, and other related property and land under development. It also leases real estate properties; offers real estate services; leasing of real estate; and acts as an agent or intermediary in the sale or purchase of real estate. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Andalan Sakti Primaindo Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Andalan Sakti Inti.
